_comment: Live config lives at $CLAUDE_PA_HOME/config.json (default: ~/.local/share/claude-pa/config.json), NOT here. This file is shipped with the plugin as a template — copy + edit, or run /claude-pa:setup-ha to have an agent fill it in for you.
_voice_pack_comment: Subdir under sounds/voices/ to use for spoken clips. Available packs ship with the plugin: 'wildcard' (default gruff dispatcher), 'wildcard-2' (alt take), 'dj-fred', 'alarmed-dispatcher' (usage warnings only).

mqtt._comment: Direct MQTT transport — alternative to home_assistant for users running Mosquitto (or any MQTT broker) with their own subscriber on a speaker / ESP / Tasmota / custom client. Each tier target prefixed 'mqtt:<key>' in the manifest publishes a JSON payload to '<base_topic>/<key>'. Subscribers are responsible for downloading audio_url and playing it. Requires mosquitto-clients (mosquitto_pub).

signal_bulb._comment: Continuous visual status channel. Fires in PARALLEL with audio dispatches. Requires an RGB-capable light entity.

screen_flash._comment: On-screen visual ping. Fires in PARALLEL with audio + signal bulb. Modes: 'overlay' (full-screen colored flash via Python tkinter — needs DISPLAY/WAYLAND_DISPLAY + python3-tk), 'notify' (libnotify desktop notification), 'auto' (overlay if available, else notify). Set enabled=false for headless environments.

wake._comment: Tier 7. Defaults OFF. Flashes the bedroom light to wake the user. Only fires within night_hours unless --force is passed.

spouse_call._comment: Tier 8. Defaults OFF. Calls the user's spouse via Twilio to passive-aggressively complain. Planned feature — stub only. Requires TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID + TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN.

escalation._comment: The escalator daemon (bin/escalator.py, run via /claude-pa:setup-escalator) watches an idle marker and fires higher tiers when Claude is left waiting. Tier delays come from sounds/manifest.json (delay_seconds per tier). max_tier hard-caps the daemon — anything above is silently downgraded. Override per-session with env CLAUDE_PA_MAX_TIER.

usage_monitor._comment: Polls Claude Code session JSONL and fires usage:* dispatches on threshold crossings. Run via a Stop hook (see commands/setup-usage-monitor.md). session_token_budget defines what 100% means for one session.
